item.title: Premier League Power Rankings: Chelsea up, Liverpool down in ratings of all 20 teams
item.description: ESPN's Premier League Power Rankings return to look at all 20 teams: Chelsea are up, Liverpool are down, and Crystal Palace are on fire.

item.title: Who wins People's Puskás Award for world's best amateur goal of the year?
item.description: A sublime overhead kick, a long-range half-volley, and some exquisite control followed by a rabona.

item.title: How the top QB signings will fit in 2026
item.description: The top 2026 recruits at each position have their new homes. Here's how their games will work.

item.title: The game that will define the 2026 season for every power-conference team
item.description: These are the showdowns you should already have circled on your college football calendar.

item.title: What to expect at NFL combine workouts: Kiper, Miller, Reid and Yates answer 11 questions
item.description: Which NFL draft prospects should have great combine performances? Who could run the fastest 40-yard dashes, and who will climb boards this week?
